error[E0277]: the trait bound `i8: From<i32>` is not satisfied
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/deepseek-v3.2/conversions/bool_char_int_c3/sample_002/target.rs:25:9
   |
25 |     if (i8::from(-1i32) < 0) {
   |         ^^ the trait `From<i32>` is not implemented for `i8`
   |
   = help: the trait `From<i32>` is not implemented for `i8`
           but trait `From<bool>` is implemented for it
   = help: for that trait implementation, expected `bool`, found `i32`
